name: Test Submission
partners: All of them because all of them are awesome
description: This is a test submission.

name: Cowboys
partners: Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash (Computer Use / Interactions API) powers every agent: visual reasoning over screenshots and live browser control on real websites, plus an LLM judge that scores arbitrary tasks.
description: Agent Arena is an evolutionary tournament where AI agents compete on the same real-world web task, learn from the winner, and get smarter every round.

name: RSI
description: A Recursive Self-Improving AI that fine-tunes its own weights from failures - meta agent, target agent, LoRA, repeat.

name: shake
partners: LiveKit, Digital Ocean, MiniMax, MongoDB, Google, Modular
description: Earthquake simulator for historical DeepShake analysis, shake prediction and damage estimation, plus multiagent workflow with continual learning and improvement stack.

name: field-ratchet: a recursively self-improving AI for PCB design.
partners: Modular/Mojo for the hot loop (CPU for the meta optimization / RSI)
description: Fieldratchet turns the manual PCB layout loop into an executable, self-improving compiler: feed it a KiCad schematic and it parses, classifies, places, routes, and scores a real board.

name: Atlantis
description: An RL agent (GRPO + LoRA) that learns person-specific privacy attacks universal safety filters miss, recursively self-improving its own weights and curriculum.

name: agentic_ontology
description: DeFi/Crypto Macro-Regime RSI Engine - eight specialized AI agents continuously analyze live Federal Reserve economic data, synthesized into a single market verdict backed by an ontology knowledge graph.

name: Omnicon RSI
partners: Google Gemini Flash, Google Gemini Pro
description: Taking golden summaries from Omnicon and using them to improve and benchmark conversation summarizers.

name: RecursiveLearner
description: Training-free recursive self-improvement via test-time 'lessons memory'. A small open model improves itself at inference time with zero weight updates.

name: Kevin Durant
partners: Gemini 3.5 Flash, MongoDB Atlas, Voyage AI
description: Self-Taught Operator is an AI agent, built on Gemini 3.5 Flash computer-use, that teaches itself to operate software it's never seen by writing its own verified skills from its own successes.

name: Bonsai
partners: MongoDB Atlas Vector Search, Voyage AI, Google Gemini 3.5 (Vertex AI), DigitalOcean App Platform
description: Turns domain experts into bonsai gardeners. They shape the ideal form once and the harness watches a cited-answer agent, catches claims whose citations don't trace to source, and clusters failures by meaning.

name: Veritas
partners: LiveKit, Gemini Live API, Gemini Interactions, 3.5 Flash
description: A silent AI agent that fact-checks live meetings/debates in real time. Handles over 70 languages and matches spoken claims against a local database in two milliseconds.

name: Two Levers
description: SIA x GraphWorldModels - a self-improving AI loop where every improvement is measured against reality.

name: EvoLoRA
description: An auditable, bounded self-improvement loop for LoRA fine-tuning. A MiniMax agent plans the evaluation set, training data, and LoRA hyperparameters; a small model is trained and scored against a locked benchmark.

name: Auto QA
partners: Google Gemini 3.5 pro with computer use, Google managed agents
description: A self-improving system to QA changes with evidence and add reviews in GitHub using Gemini Managed Agents and Computer Use.

name: SubStrata
partners: Google (Gemini 3.5 Flash, Gemma 4, Google Earth Engine), MongoDB Atlas Cluster
description: A satellite classifier that gets smarter from its mistakes without ever retraining the model. Labels satellite imagery into land cover and improves via a Gemini Strategist that writes plain-English lessons.

name: PiPlan
description: Engram is a continuous-learning memory system that lets an LLM keep serving users while deciding what to store in RAG, what durable beliefs to internalize into model weights, and hot-loading those edits live.

name: SplatForge
partners: Google Gemini 3.5 Flash, MongoDB Atlas, Digital Ocean GPU Droplet, Minimax
description: A robot manipulation agent that trains itself inside the worlds it reconstructs via 3D Gaussian Splat digital twins and autonomous policy learning.

name: OpsGym
description: A self-improving policy engine for operations teams.

name: AcmeBox
description: Fine-tuning company-specific models for customer support with an EffectTS REST API, MCP Server, and custom AcmeBox Bench evaluation inspired by Sierra's tau2-bench.

name: autodiscover
partners: Managed Agents in the Gemini API, Computer Use in Gemini 3.5 Flash
description: Personalized feature creation and discovery - solves the problem of apps that are too complex or too simple, using X as a case study.

name: Recallroom
partners: Google Gemini 3.5 and Computer Use, Gemini Live
description: A copilot for learners. Rolli watches lectures with you in real time, compiling a wiki and improving its knowledge base in real time.

name: RSIW
description: LLM-driven world and reward design and improvement based on policy feedback.

name: BrickByBrick
partners: LiveKit, DigitalOcean, Gemini, Managed Agents, MongoDB
description: An autonomous visual-agentic data factory that finds a small model's UI-coding blind spots, turns them into a training set, and LoRA-fine-tunes the model on real GPUs live.

name: Bron
description: A recursively self-improving infrastructure for solving complex supply chain optimizations via modular execution graphs that continuously restructure topology by selectively breeding successful graphs.

name: Darwin SRE
description: Self-improving SRE System.

name: SQLWriters
description: Drift detection and automated self-improvement for AI agents: detects when accuracy silently degrades and makes the agent learn from its own failures to recover autonomously.

name: Ignore All Previous Instructions
partners: Gemini and Gemma (GDM OSS and frontier models)
description: Superprediction is a continual learning system over prediction markets using Gemma E4B with Exa search and on-policy self-distillation.

name: Solux
partners: Digital Ocean, MiniMax, MongoDB, Google, Modular
description: An AI-powered geospatial screening platform for solar and solar-plus-storage development in India and the US, turning natural-language requests into evidence-backed site-screening workflows.

name: AgentShield
description: A self-improving guardrails system for securing customer-facing AI agents against adversarial attacks, focusing on business-rule violations specific to each agent.

name: GPU Sitter
partners: Digital Ocean (Ubuntu Droplet + Spaces for AcmeTrace dataset storage)
description: An on-call engineer that responds to GPU datacenter cluster failures. Inspects NVIDIA sensor data and updates its own small ML prediction model for failures.

name: PodMan: Pair Programmer
partners: LiveKit, Digital Ocean, MongoDB, Google (Gemini, Gemma), Modular
description: https://www.podman.live/

name: OmniForge
description: The Self-Healing Proxy - autonomous runtime debugging, patching, and hot-swapping for production AI systems.

name: OmegaPacman: Interpretable Multi-Agent Learning
partners: Managed Agents in Gemini, Google Cloud, Vertex AI, Gemini 3.5 Flash, Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite, Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite
description: Four ghost agents learn to catch Pac-Man. After each round, each ghost rewrites its strategy in plain English - the entire learned strategy is human-readable text, not neural weights.

name: Autodrone
description: An LLM-driven drone agent in a self-improvement loop. Each flight produces structured rollout data stored in MongoDB where successful trajectories become reusable flight memory.

name: Veche
partners: Google Gemini (2.5 Computer Use swarm + Gemma operator), MongoDB Atlas (shared memory + vector search), Voyage AI (multimodal embeddings), DigitalOcean (hosting)
description: Makes computer-use reliable and cheap on legacy software with no API/DOM/MCP. A swarm of vision agents maps the app from pixels into shared memory by consensus.

name: GravityMedShield
description: Human-in-the-Loop Recursive Medical De-identification. Addresses the bottleneck of AI in healthcare - access to medical data requiring strict PHI sanitation.

name: Aperacium
description: ABLE runs four Gemini Computer Use agents in parallel for legal work, producing a court-ready Motion for Summary Judgment in under 4 minutes.

name: Recursive Shield
partners: Google Gemini, MongoDB, MiniMax, LiveKit, DigitalOcean, Modular
description: Protects browser-use AI agents from audio prompt-injection attacks, sitting at the tool boundary and blocking unsafe behavior before state changes occur.

name: Dream Harness
description: A macOS health app for AI coding harnesses: runs a 'Sleep Cycle' that scores collaboration quality and turns friction into reviewable improvements.

name: A.S.F
description: Autonomous SRE agents with bounded tree search on a live Kubernetes cluster. The LLM proposes candidate actions, a synthesized verifier prunes unsafe branches.

name: Temper
description: Evaluates the harness around a model (system prompt, skill files, tool definitions) - identifies where the environment helps or hurts performance and shows the delta vs. bare-model baseline.

name: Rune
description: Stack Overflow for the agentic era. Passively monitors agentic coding sessions, captures traces/errors/fixes, and turns them into reusable debugging memory.

name: tutorAI
description: Deploys simulated AI student agents on DigitalOcean that interact with any AI tutor in real time to measure tutoring effectiveness.

name: Yolo WallStreet Model
description: A modular AI trading research system forecasting short-term stock moves by combining market data, Chronos time-series modeling, news ingestion, and LLM reasoning.

name: Darwins
partners: Google Gemini 3.5 Flash, Antigravity (Interactions API), MongoDB Atlas Vector Search, Voyage AI, DigitalOcean (Gradient Inference)
description: An AI that researches quant trading alphas and measurably gets better at it. Each generation it proposes signals, kills the weak, breeds the strong, and accumulates vector memory. Discovers +119% more profitable signals with memory on.

name: Judy
partners: Google Gemini-3.5-flash, OpenAI (synthetic data + critique), GCP, Antigravity
description: Self-learning Judge and Jury for Question Answering Tasks. Improves the LLM-as-judge using recursive self-improvement methods.

name: Gemini CUA Skill Loop
description: A training-free loop that lets a computer-use agent learn reusable skills from its own failures, keeping a skill only if a verified retry proves it works.

name: SeaForge
description: A Gemini-powered self-learning loop for Autonomous Surface Vessel manufacturers testing ships against real Navy mission briefs with persistent memory of component failures.

name: Focal point
description: A chat interface that watches how you read via webcam iris tracking and adapts in real time. A Reward Agent scores gaze zones and a Prompt Agent rebuilds the system prompt from your reading profile.

name: Agent University
description: Rigorous infrastructure for agent self-improvement: MCP trajectory recorder, skill versioning, and isolated sandboxed evaluation to prevent overfitting and reward-hacking.

name: Tutor Loop
description: An education marketplace where human tutoring teaches the AI tutor to get better, with persistent memory across sessions.

name: RACx
partners: Gemini Live API (live-translate-preview), LiveKit Cloud, DigitalOcean Managed Postgres + pgvector
description: Recursive Autonomous Customer Experience. Moves the needle from answering a question to solving the underlying ticket.

name: rote
description: A self-improving computer-use agent for real desktop work. Records runs, compiles them into reusable skills, verifies against ground truth, and stores so future requests replay instantly with zero model calls.

name: Shadermind
partners: Digital Ocean API key, Minimax M3, LiveKit
description: An agent that draws GLSL sketches; you steer with 1-5 ratings and notes. It learns your taste over time via PLUS preference memory.

name: Gatekeeper
partners: Google Gemini, Digital Ocean (GPU - ended up using Lambda Labs due to availability)
description: The trust layer for production web agents. Gemini 3.5 Flash predicts each screen, a self-trained Gemma LoRA acts, a never-worse gate blocks regressions, and every action ships a tamper-evident signed receipt.

name: IntoTheUnknown
description: An AI discovers an unknown planet's physics by updating its weights and recording discovered facts into memory, mimicking how humans learn.

name: Cadenza
description: A composition feedback tool that learns each composer's individual voice over time, accumulating evaluations into a per-composer profile across six dimensions.

name: Marine Gravity
partners: Google Gemini, Managed Agents in the Gemini API
description: An agentic coding manager that continuously improves to deliver high-quality PRs with minimum human input, coordinating across GitHub, Linear, and Slack.

name: Gambit
description: A self-improving auto-negotiator. Lists your secondhand item, negotiates with buyers, and gets better at it from its own past negotiations with no human labeling via continual self-play learning.
Kun - mission control agent for autonomous research agents. A trajectory-centric interface: mission -> hypotheses -> code diffs -> experiments -> metrics -> decisions.

name: DynaAgent
description: A self-evolving multi-agent framework that dynamically synthesizes agents, constructs adaptive workflows, evaluates agent performance, and refines future executions through accumulated experience.

name: LaunchLens
partners: Google Gemini, LiveKit, MiniMax, Digital Ocean
description: Helps teams safely test and launch AI agents. Converts requirements into a golden QA flow, uses Gemini Computer Use to test through the browser, and captures screenshots, transcripts, and evals.

name: yunaki
description: Shared memory and self-evolving skills for agent teams. Your code, your model, your memory - shared across your team.

name: RevMem
description: Governance and context for autonomous enterprise agents.

name: Liminal Engine
description: The governance layer for agentic work that gets smarter every time a human corrects it. Catches agent drift, enforces corrections as real operating state, and turns corrections into evals for the next pass.

name: Muse the Agent
description: StoryForge: an end-to-end AI pipeline that transforms a simple character idea into a fully illustrated, publish-ready children's storybook using Google's agent pipeline and a three-skill architecture.

name: RAX
description: A real-time, low-latency robotic agent framework powered by Gemini 3.1 Flash Audio and LiveKit Agents, enabling autonomous robots to see, hear, and execute physical actions via bidirectional WebRTC.

name: VOICE-BRIDGE
partners: DigitalOcean Gradient AI (OpenAI-compatible inference gateway), LiveKit, and others
description: A real-time, multimodal lip-reading assistive-communication tool for people with ALS. Translates lip movements to speech as ALS progressively destroys vocal communication.
